canonical_definition: SEED-Bench Image Part (SEEDI) is a benchmark focusing on generative comprehension for multimodal LLMs, specifically its image-related tasks.
papers: Efficient Large Multi-modal Models via Visual Context Compression
InternLM-XComposer2-4KHD: A Pioneering Large Vision-Language Model Handling Resolutions from 336 Pixels to 4K HD
